steps.title: Separate statement and example
steps.content: The first clause makes a general statement about travelers flying more frequently. The next sentence gives San Diego International Airport as a specific example, so the general statement should end before For example introduces the illustration.

steps.title: Reject misplaced transitions
steps.content: Choice A attaches for example to the end of the general statement. Choice B does the same and then adds an awkward semicolon. Choice D uses commas in a way that creates a comma splice between two independent clauses. The answer is C.
